title: Healthcare Clinic Voice Receptionist
description: A voice-first AI receptionist for medical clinics that books appointments, answers FAQs, recognizes returning callers, and escalates to staff when needed. Built for low-latency conversational feel using real-time streaming over WebRTC.

tools.name: book_appointment
tools.description: Book, reschedule, cancel appointments; check availability; list upcoming appointments

tools.name: get_clinic_info
tools.description: Clinic FAQ: hours, address, insurance, parking, services, pre-visit instructions

tools.name: request_medical_records
tools.description: Request medical records copy (pickup or send)

tools.name: set_appointment_reminder
tools.description: Request SMS/email reminder for existing appointment

tools.name: lookup_caller
tools.description: Recognize returning callers by phone number for personalization

tools.name: escalate_to_human
tools.description: Transfer to human staff with ticket (medical advice, billing, complaints)

tools.name: end_call
tools.description: End call when caller is satisfied or says goodbye
